很充实，情节一环一环。
这才是我想象中的怪谈啊！
相比于那种一个技能就无敌的那种，我真的是服了。
不过我也不拿来比，反正我感觉这本小说挺好看的。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1674398746,"group_id":"7182517041885088825","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"还要简介呀！凑个字数，嘻嘻","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwJC94a/oNxwGmbspH5eYjMSeW5Tfy1s8ybinzFTstX8","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b75b967638494b1aac15d5f0863aa0cd~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795612&x-signature=fgXkBCe93SLlSMD%2Baugy1ymZT1g%3D","user_id":"2045553409268971","user_name":"钂"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2045553409268971","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7182517041885088825","book_info":{"abstract":"怪谈世界降临，一切必须遵循规则的指示！
时隔数百年，怪谈世界再次出现，孙恺意外穿越过来，成为第一批国运者。
他们的身上承担着夏国的国运！
赢，他们存活，夏国国运提升，夏国人都能得到好处。
输，他们身死，国运降低，怪谈也会降临现实。
和其他人不同的是，孙恺能够看到其他人看不到的一些隐藏提示。
【第一个规则怪谈：过家家】
【一家人必须要整整齐齐，和和睦睦，一个都不能少】","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/bb7036549ae0d7f3ee8c01069393a0cb","author":"星无辰","author_id":"","book_id":"7182517041885088825","book_name":"规则怪谈：我只玩S级副本","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#100808","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":496,"name":"国运","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=496&name=国运&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":851,"name":"规则怪谈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=851&name=规则怪谈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7183000936363754043","read_count":"34748","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2300204"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"1123","tags":"悬疑脑洞,系统,穿越,直播,灵异,国运,规则怪谈,魂穿,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c95be4635bece66a7f175de7c32522da~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779450762&x-signature=JwHCmFKPU2kMZZuFMJ0dNXO01rw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.4186603e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231952424D7CB4680898DD75DA82"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":46,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":14186,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":69454},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7198403625075606287","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"更新稳定，一日三更，但依旧不够看啊！
感觉这本书更像带国运的怪谈小说，而不是规则怪谈小说，规则的存在感有点小，但好看是真好看。
和其他规则怪谈小说对比，在设定和剧情上很明显不同，感觉也更吸引我，加油更啊，作者貌似不在番茄，送礼催更都送不了QAQ"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1676009025,"group_id":"7182517041885088825","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2075487123028976"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7182517041885088825","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4.2473847e+07"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读15小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":12458,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":54931,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7186768529411801896","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"虽然才更到80多章，但目前来讲剧情还是挺不错的。
看了挺多规则怪谈的小说，这本算是恐怖的氛围感最高的一本了。
主副本剧情，直播，弹幕，现实世界的剧情比较少，也就不存在水字数的问题，这一点很nice
剧情方面，虽然是规则怪谈，但这本书规则的存在感不是很强【特指第二个副本】，希望后面还是以规则为主，惊悚解密为辅（一丢丢小建议）
虽然也有一些其他文里常见的小毛病，不过影响不大，起码我这么的挑剔的人都可以继续看下去。
稍微明显一些的问题，就是感觉主角有时候的智商忽上忽下，不过好在基本上没太大影响。
好像简介说无女主，期待后续剧情。","text_exts":[{"e":33,"s":29,"text":"规则怪谈","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E6%80%AA%E8%B0%88&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774266762DD75DA82%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227186768529411801896%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227182517041885088825%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E6%80%AA%E8%B0%88%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1673300193,"group_id":"7182517041885088825","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"白昼如夜，许你人间","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7pSxyKWQEx5FPaNPbc+DNzVab0ChpJIq9B4OSrrnAJk","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/61b560eb97044277b37f331c0924661d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787263&x-signature=13JdKzFO%2BVnncefzYhO0Sw%2BHL%2Fk%3D","user_id":"2075487123028976","user_name":"一只史莱姆"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2075487123028976","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1776705237,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/no
